scripts.install:all: npm run install:client && npm run install:server
scripts.build:server: cmd /c "cd server && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m PyInstaller --onefile --hidden-import=uvicorn.logging --hidden-import=uvicorn.loops --hidden-import=uvicorn.loops.auto --hidden-import=uvicorn.protocols --hidden-import=uvicorn.protocols.http --hidden-import=uvicorn.protocols.http.auto --hidden-import=uvicorn.protocols.websockets --hidden-import=uvicorn.protocols.websockets.auto --hidden-import=uvicorn.lifespan --hidden-import=uvicorn.lifespan.on --name lbdc_server app\main.py && copy .env dist\.env"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.make:all: npm run install:all && npm run build:all && npm run make:win32 && npm run make:win64
